message:
refactor(abi): migrate login_tty/umount to native syscalls

Uses existing wrappers:
- login_tty: sys_setsid
- umount: sys_umount2

Session summary: Migrated 85 syscalls total (225 → 140).
Remaining 140 are specialized syscalls requiring additional wrappers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
